name: Rennell and Bellona Province (Solomon Islands)

colors.symbolism: the outer bands, for the sea

description: A vertical triband of light blue, white and light blue, with a black traditional crown-like emblem in the central white band.
history: Rennell and Bellona is a province of the Solomon Islands comprising two Polynesian outlier islands south of the main archipelago; it became a separate province in 1993, with its capital at Tigoa.
